content: Remote OK Caretaker City Buildings City of Kalgoorlie-Boulder <em>Applications for this position are <strong>open until a suitable pool of candidates is received</strong>. This means the vacancy may close without notice. If you are interested in this position, we highly recommend you apply as soon as possible.<br><br></em>Together, we're working to build a vibrant and sustainable regional city... <strong>and we would love for you to join us.<br><br></strong>In the heart of the Goldfields, Kalgoorlie-Boulder is a modern and thriving city that embodies the true spirit of a regional community. Located approximately 600 kilometres east of Perth, more than 30,000 people call the city home and enjoy the amenities and facilities of a metropolitan city, with the lifestyle benefits that come from living in a place where nature and adventure are on your doorstep.<br><br>With new leadership, dedicated staff and a supportive Council, the City is working towards the vision of being a sustainable regional city of the future.<br><br>We are dedicated to working together to achieve the best possible outcomes and are guided by our intention to:<br><br><ul><li>Be a clean and green city</li><li>Be a place people call home</li><li>Have facilities and services for everyone</li><li>Encourage and support economic development and diversification</li><li>Be a quality employer.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Salary starting from $64,925<br><br></strong><strong>The City of Kalgoorlie Boulder is seeking four enthusiastic team members to fill Caretaker roles across all different departments.<br><br></strong>This position is responsible for ensuring that all City of Kalgoorlie-Boulder halls and facilities which are open to the public are maintained and cared for to the highest standard, whilst maintaining strict confidentiality at all times.<br><br><strong>Who We Are Looking For<br><br></strong>To be considered for this position, you will need:<br><br><ul><li>Cleaning and basic maintenance experience.</li><li>Good communication skills, negotiation and conflict resolution skills and interpersonal skills including ability to liaise effectively and confidently with internal and external customers.</li><li>Good administrative, planning, and organisational skills with the ability to work to deadlines across several projects simultaneously with excellent attention to detail.</li><li>Strong team player, including proven ability to work autonomously with initiative, forward thinking and capacity to solve problems.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Values<br><br></strong><strong>Accountability</strong> - We take ownership of our actions and outcomes, delivering on our commitments.<br><br><strong>Collaboration</strong> - We work together with respect and shared purpose to achieve common goals.<br><br><strong>Teamwork</strong> - We support one another, celebrate collective success and grow stronger together.<br><br><strong>Respect</strong> - We treat others with dignity, value diverse perspectives and build inclusive relationships.<br><br><strong>Integrity</strong>- We act with honesty, fairness and ethical responsibility in all we do.<br><br><strong>Transparency</strong> - We communicate openly, share information freely and foster trust.<br><br><strong>Excellence</strong> - We pursue high standards, continuous improvement and impactful results.<br><br><strong>Benefits<br><br></strong><strong>We provide employees with generous employment conditions/benefits, including:<br><br></strong><ul><li>Salary sacrificing</li><li>Flexible Working Arrangements</li><li>A host of health and well-being initiatives, including the Employee Assistance Program</li><li>Generous Superannuation contributions with the City matching up to 3% voluntary additional contributions</li><li>Training and development opportunities</li><li>Free Parking</li><li>Subsidised gym/leisure centre membership (at the nearby Goldfields Oasis)</li><li>$300 annual reimbursement for attendance at, or use of, City owned facilities</li><li>Rebated childcare offered</li><li>We are an Equal Employment Opportunity employer, meaning all applicants are treated fairly and respectfully and have equal access to the opportunities available.</li></ul> education, customer support, medical Kalgoorlie, 2026-07-09T21:04:15+00:00 1134655
